subject: fix(data): correct project accent colors to match actual app brand colors
body:
Checked each deployed project's source code for actual primary/brand colors.
7 of 9 were wrong. Updated all to match.

Notable decisions:
- Sancio: actual brand is #1e293b (dark slate) — too dark to be visible as
  an accent on #0a0a0a background, so using #64748b (slate-500) instead
- model-pear and repo-tor both genuinely use #2D68FF — kept accurate

Tags: data, projects, styling, visual-identity
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-redesign
Semver: patch
